message:
fix(clippy): resolve lint warnings in search_v3 and two_tier modules

- search_v3: convert match-to-let-else for bridge access (3 instances)
- search_v3: move const BATCH_SIZE before let statements
- search_v3: add backticks to doc comments (SQLite, backfill_from_db)
- search_v3: use i64::try_from instead of usize-to-i64 cast in test
- two_tier: collapse nested if-let into single guard clause (2 instances)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
